body.title: Extend ADC goal node to include factory-factory framing
body.result: Palace nodes written: ADC summary updated + new palace.shared.akien.goals.factory-factory node defining the methodology-portable factory goal
body.description:
Find the existing ADC program-factory goal node in the palace and extend it to include the factory-factory framing: same skills/telemetry/audit methodology portable to non-coding projects.

Add to node: 'The long-term target is a factory factory — a portable, self-improving development substrate that can build any project type, not just code.'

**Affected files:** palace node (edit existing — find via memory_search 'program factory goal')
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Palace edit only; no code changes, no new tickets referencing this goal yet
**Test plan:** no tests — palace write; read back node and verify updated text is present
